name: Share Campaign
description: Demonstrates the sequence to generate a read-only share link for a campaign and for a viewer to access it.

sequence.action: GM requests to share a campaign.
Generates and persists a unique share token for the campaign.
Returns the generated share URL to the frontend.
Displays the share URL to the GM.
Requests read-only campaign data using the share token from the URL.
Validates token and returns read-only campaign data.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Clicks 'Share Campaign'
    Browser->>+AppServer: GET /campaigns/{id}/share (invokes LI-007)
    AppServer->>+Database: UPDATE campaigns SET share_token=...
    Database-->>-AppServer: {share_token}
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {share_url: ...}
    Browser-->>GM: Displays Share URL

    actor Viewer
    Viewer->>+Browser: Accesses Share URL
    Browser->>+AppServer: GET /shared/{token} (invokes LI-008)
    AppServer->>+Database: SELECT * FROM campaigns WHERE share_token=...
    Database-->>-AppServer: Campaign Data
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns Read-Only Campaign Data
    Browser-->>-Viewer: Renders Read-Only View
```
